overlay_pattern.summary: This creator predominantly utilizes picture-in-picture videos alongside static images to enhance the visual experience of their reels. The overlays are often positioned in the middle sections of the screen and serve to reinforce key points in the narrative, particularly during hooks and middle segments. The frequent use of animated elements suggests an engaging approach to content delivery.

entries.script_context: During the hook/open and middle of the reel, to emphasize brand mentions and attract attention.
In the middle position, reinforcing the brand mention.
During the middle of the reel, to complement the discussion about user participation.
